1.description: select Finnmark fylke geometry and id

2.description: select all municipalities (objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, geometry)

3.description: filter municipalities to those inside Finnmark

5.description: select buildings in Finnmark municipalities (will use kommunenummer list from step 3)

6.description: find buildings that intersect 200-year flood areas

8.description: sort municipalities by building count desc

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [fylker]
SELECT objid, fylkesnummer, fylkesnavn, omrade FROM fylker_a60155918c4a47c2b78f4ab52fc2bfa4.fylke WHERE LOWER(fylkesnavn) LIKE '%finnmark%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: spatial_join
-- left_source: 2
-- right_source: 1
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [flomsoner]
SELECT objid, gjentaksintervall, flomsoneid, ST_AsEWKB(omrade) AS omrade FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal WHERE gjentaksintervall = 200;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, representasjonspunkt FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning WHERE kommunenummer LIKE '56%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 6: spatial_join
-- left_source: 5
-- right_source: 4
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "representasjonspunkt"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

1.description: find the Finnmark fylke row and its geometry

2.description: get all municipalities with their geometries

3.description: select municipalities that lie in Finnmark

4.description: get 200-year flood zones nationwide (to be reduced by municipality extent)

5.description: reduce 200-year flood zones to those intersecting Finnmark municipalities

6.description: get buildings located in the Finnmark municipalities (filtered by kommunenummer list from step 3)

7.description: find buildings that intersect 200-year flood zones in Finnmark

8.description: count buildings per municipality, sort descending, limit to top 5

args.sql:
-- Reduce flood zones to those intersecting Finnmark municipalities
SELECT f.objid, f.gjentaksintervall, f.flomsoneid, ST_AsEWKB(f.omrade) AS omrade
FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal f
JOIN kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune k
  ON ST_Intersects(f.omrade, k.omrade)
WHERE f.gjentaksintervall = 200
  AND k.kommunenummer LIKE '56%';
